problem id: 00754598
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10101001 -> 01100010
  00110011 -> 10010100
  00100111 -> 00110001
  11011100 -> 11010111
  01110010 -> 10001100
  01010001 -> 10011100
  00100101 -> 00100001
  00100001 -> 00000000
  10011111 -> 11011111

query: 01111110
predicted answer: 11101111
